nl_query: Which faculty members have prepared answer keys for papers where they are also assigned as the board coordinator, creating a potential conflict of interest?
failed_sql: SELECT fc.id AS faculty_id, fc.name AS faculty_name, qp.title AS paper_title, b.id AS board_id FROM faculty_cache fc JOIN answer_key ak ON ak.faculty_cache_id = fc.id JOIN question_paper qp ON qp.id = ak.qp_id JOIN board b ON b.qp_id = qp.id JOIN board_coordinator bc ON bc.board_id = b.id AND bc.faculty_cache_id = fc.id
error: Validation failed (schema): Column 'ak.faculty_cache_id' does not exist. Verify that the column is defined on the table referenced by its alias prefix, or that the alias prefix matches a table declared in FROM/JOIN.
